---
title: "Welcome"
---

# Patchmosaic

Welcome to your Quarto website.

This starter site includes:

- A Jupyter Notebook post
- An R Markdown post
- GitHub Actions publishing workflow

## Latest posts

- [Python Notebook Post](posts/2026-05-16-python-post/index.ipynb)
- [R Markdown Post](posts/2026-05-17-r-post/index.Rmd)
